headline: American Express Shareholders Back Board, Reject Proposals as 2025 Results Hit Records
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) shareholders elected all 13 director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers as the company’s independent registered public accounting firm for 2026 and approved the advisory vote on executive compensation at the company’s 2026 annual meeting.
